title: Christmas Concepts® 280mm (11") White LED Acrylic Snowman Christmas Decoration - Battery Operated - Indoor Christmas Decorations
features: This beautiful light decoration would look amazing sat on your mantle piece or as a centre piece on your Christmas table!
The fun snowman design features 40 white LED lights - the LED lights are bright while also being low voltage and energy efficient.
The easy to use decoration includes a timer function that enables you to set the lights on for 8 hours.
It operates on 3 x AA batteries (not included) and has a 50cm transparent lead wire. The snowman measures 17x16.5x28cm.
Designed and manufactured exclusively for Christmas Concepts Ltd.
